5.Description: Beneath the twisted canopy of the Tuzari Wilds rests the heart of the jungle’s corruption. Ages ago, the old empires sacrificed one hundred holy martyrs to forge a colossal blade called the Demonbrand. With it, they impaled the demon lord Baphumos, trapping his body and hunger in stone. Now the Prophet Ez’rath leads the Urrak into the ruins, offering blood and prayer to awaken the demon once more.

6.Description: Under the cold light of the moon, the dunes of the Empyrean Sands shift and whisper. From beneath their surface, the Sin-Magir rises once more, the Augur of the Stars reborn in deathless form. His followers gather beneath the constellations, drawn to a celestial relic capable of restoring their ancient empire.

7.Description: To the frozen south, high atop the Ael'deth Mountain, lies the hidden prison of Al’zerac, an ancient frost wyrm. For centuries, the Eldrin have guarded the vault, but time wears down both vigilance and faith. Cithrel now walks the outer wards, her power cracking ancient seals that once bound the Great Wyrm. When the final lock breaks, Al’zerac will rise again, not as a god to be worshiped but as a weapon to restore the Eldrin’s ancient dominion.

8.Description: Beneath the ice-choked peaks of the Ael’deth Mountains, an ancient power stirs. Frozen halls tremble as the last egg of Al’zerac’s brood pulses with life once thought extinguished. The cruel Apostate Veras leads his cult through the shattered caverns, seeking to harness the wyrmling’s power.

11.Description: In the radiant heart of Farvalaan, the Everdawn Grove blooms with golden grass and violet petals that shimmer beneath eternal sunlight. Now, shadows creep among the roots. Malgut, chieftain of the beastmen, seeks salvation for his tribe and instead finds corruption. Whispering voices promise him power, and the bloodstone crystals that grow from the soil pulse in answer. These once noble changelings call to Akari, the Dawn Lord, a great spirit who presides over Farvalaan's sunlit groves.

12.Description: A dark storm churns above the cliffs beyond Stronghold, where the arrogant orc Warlord Brogg channels thunder and fury. His raiders gather like wolves at the gate, ready to tear down the walls and claim the fort for themselves. Brogg must be made an example to prove to all other would-be bandits and raiders that the Stronghold will not be easily taken.

13.Description: The holy vault of Wraithtide sleeps beneath a tropical isle, its location guarded by generations of fearful villagers. Within lies the spirit of Bael’Aurum, a demon whose hunger for gold once drowned empires in ruin. The seal now weakens as undead pirates scour the island, led by the Deathless Katrine, who seeks to claim the demon’s treasure and power.

15.Description:
Across the endless sea lies an island shaped like a wound upon the world. Its cliffs rise in a hollow ring, surrounding a chasm that descends into endless black. From within, a haunting song drifts across the waters, luring sailors to their doom.

Beneath the waves, the Sea Witch Sinthara stirs. Her voice binds the dead, her wings blot the sky, and her call grows stronger with every ship that shatters on the rocks. Soon, her song will reach beyond the horizon, calling all who sail into her grasp.

21.Description: In the heart of the Urrak Markets, the goatmen barter lives for orcish promises of enchanted steel and dark sorcery. Beneath the noise of trade, something far grimmer moves. The orc clans prepare their captives for sacrifice, their rituals meant to rouse the demon god Baphumos from his slumber within the forsaken Demonbrand Ruins.

23.Description:
Far in the frostbitten north, the port of Drakheim howls with warcries. Bleakfrost Orcs surge across its frozen shores, enslaving the weak and spilling blood in the name of their drowned god. What was once a peaceful harbor shared by eldrin and humans now serves as a sacrificial altar to the abyss.

Dark omens gather above the sea. The tide rises red with sacrifice, and the chants of the Bleakfrost echo through ruined streets. If the ritual completes, the depths will awaken, and the god beneath the waves will claim the coast in hunger and ice.

24.Description: The eastern road connecting the Vidahlian capital to the Stronghold falls silent as merchants vanish without trace. Wagons lie overturned and their goods rot in the rain. The search for bandits leads to the edge of the forest where a simple band of goblins seems, at first glance, to be the cause of the disappearances.

25.Description: Beneath the jagged peaks of the Godfall Mountains, a hidden quarry pulses with unnatural light. The Nezari Elves have begun a relentless mining operation deep within the stone, tearing blood-red crystals from the earth in a frenzy. Their reasons remain cloaked in secrecy, but the brutality of their methods is plain to see. The Nezari prepare for war.

29.Description:
The outpost of Regath festers with decay. The land it stands upon is soaked with the blood of fallen warriors; betrayed by a Heskyr acolyte, slain in a forgotten battle, for an unholy cause. Now their restless spirits are bound to the land by the unnatural magics of the lost Blood Reliquary, hidden in the crypt beneath.

Hoping to extract the blood from within, the Heskyr have mounted an offensive on the keep's inner sanctum. They have stormed the crumbling walls with ease and now seek to unleash the dormant power, awaking the anger and hate of the unquiet dead.

30.Description:
Built at the zenith of the first Heskyrian Dynasty, the Blood Monolith served as the altar of their magic, where rituals of untold power were performed that cast doom on the world and ensured the Heskyr retained their stranglehold. After the dynasty fell, its dormant magics still protected this seat of power, and to this day, no soul who entered has ever emerged.

Now the Heskry rise again and the altars of Xul are stirring within the tower where only screams escape.

Mobs.MobName: Xul’vorith, Sentinel of the Bloodbound Gate
Vel’korath the Sanctified, Vision of the Covenant

31.Description:
From atop their ancient towers, the Scryers of old looked down on the little people of the world and peered into the deepest of their secrets. Through their arcane devices, they gained incredible insight for centuries, not least the location of the Blood Reliquaries, thought lost at the downfall of the first Heskyrian Dynasty, thousands of years ago.

Now the resurgent Heskyr lay siege to the ruined tower, seeking the long-lost knowledge of the Scryers; the final locations of the last remaining Blood Reliquaries that will bring about the triumphant resurgence of the Blood Order.

2.Name: Sahril's Madness
2.Description:
Enemies receive 30% Increased Threat from Damage Dealers and Healers.

"The last peaceful night passed, as we awoke to a world of rapturous hatred."

3.Name: Elheryn's Exile
3.Description: Enemy's Interruptable abilities and Dispellable effects deal 20% more damage.

5.Name: Asha's Dilemma
5.Description:
Dungeons have a Time Limit.

When the Time Limit expires:
• Heroes gain bonus Spirit Generation.
• Dungeon Score is reduced.

6.Name: Asha's Regret
6.Description:
Dungeons have a Time Limit.

When the Time Limit expires:
• Loot is reduced 1 Upgrade level.
• Dungeon Score is reduced.

8.Name: Blood Shards
8.Description:
Blood Shards erupt from dying enemies, dealing 1.5% of their maximum health in damage to all heroes.

BONUS
Heroes hit by Blood Shards gain 1% Expertise for 30 seconds, stacking up to 15 times.

9.Name: Carnage
9.Description:
All incoming damage applies a bleed for 6% of damage taken on all heroes divided evenly. When a hero's health is above 90% the Carnage bleed is removed.

Carnage is dispellable.

BONUS
Heroes heal for 10% of all damage dealt by any hero, divided evenly in the group.

Each time a Boss is defeated, heroes gain an additional 2.5% healing from damage dealt.

10.Name: Challenge
10.Description:
Non-boss enemies deal 10% more damage and have 10% more health.

BONUS
+10% Spirit

11.Name: Binding Ice
11.Description:
Periodically, one hero is afflicted by an icy curse. After 5 seconds the curse erupts, dealing magic damage to all heroes within the radius and rooting them for 3 seconds.

BONUS
Enemies hit by Binding Ice are stunned for 2 seconds. Binding Ice deals 100% increased damage against enemies.

12.Name: Empowered Minions
12.Description:
Several enemies in each dungeon are empowered, gaining +100% Health and +150% Power.

BONUS
Empowered Minions award triple Kill Score, and upon defeating an Empowered Minion heroes gain +20% Haste and +20% Movement Speed for 40 seconds.

13.Name: Malevolent Shade
13.Description:
As heroes kill enemies, eventually a Malevolent Shade will appear, reducing all damage taken by other nearby enemies by 50% and increasing their Haste by 20% until the shade is killed.

BONUS
Heroes instantly replenish 85% Max Health and 50% Max Mana upon defeating the Malevolent Shade

14.Name: Meteor Rain
14.Description:
Periodically, burning meteors crash down on heroes, splitting up into fragments that damage and stun on impact.

BONUS
Each time a meteor strikes the ground, heroes generate 2 Spirit towards their Spirit Ability.

15.Name: Stone Skin
15.Description:
Non-boss enemies have 30% increased Maximum Health

BONUS
Non-boss enemies explode on death, dealing 15% of their maximum health as physical damage over 6 seconds to all other enemies and bosses in an area around them. This effect does not stack. The highest damage Stoneskin effect overwrites existing ones.

16.Name: Ultimatum
16.Description:
Bosses deal 5% more damage and have 10% more health.

BONUS
Heroes' ability cooldowns are reduced by 10%.

18.Name: Promoted Enemies
18.Description: Some mobs & bosses have +1 difficulty stats until the dungeon timer runs out.

19.Name: Shadow Lord's Trial
19.Description:
The Shadow Lord has intervened, accumulating all kill score. As enemies are killed, Shadow Orbs are spawned nearby that can be collected by heroes.

Upon collecting 30x Shadow Orbs, an Emissary of the Shadow Lord will arrive to challenge you. Defeating it will reward Kill Score.

BONUS
Each time an Emissary of the Shadow Lord is defeated, heroes gain Shadow's Defeat for 60 seconds, increased all damage dealt by 20% and increasing Haste and Movement Speed by 20%.

20.Name: Ghorn the Avalanche
20.Description:
Ghorn the Avalanche is waiting for you somewhere in the dungeon. If you challenge him in combat and defeat him, he will assist you.

BONUS
Defeat Ghorn to gain Ghorn's Boon and gain back 20 seconds to the Dungeon Timer.

Ghorn's Boon
Ghorn will join you periodically while in boss encounters and help you.

21.Name: Krumbug the Naughty
21.Description:
Krumbug the Naughty is waiting for you somewhere in the dungeon. If you challenge him in combat and defeat him, you will gain access to his bag of tricks.

BONUS
Defeat Krumbug to gain Krumbug's Bag of Tricks and gain back 60 seconds to the Dungeon Timer.

Krumbug's Bag of Tricks
Each time you deal damage to any enemy, you have a chance (10 PPM) to release a wind-up mouse to charge at the enemy, exploding upon arrival for damage to the target and nearby enemies.

22.Name: Eira the White Witch
22.Description:
Eira the White Witch is waiting for you somewhere in the dungeon. If you challenge her in combat and defeat her, she will assist you.

BONUS
Defeat Eira to gain The White Witch's Boon and gain back 90 seconds to the Dungeon Timer.

The White Witch's Boon
Eira will appear near you every 120 seconds and spawn a Winter Rune on the ground that persists for up to 30 seconds. When a player steps on the rune, they gain an absorb shield equal to 50% of their maximum health. While the shield is active, they take 50% reduced damage and are slowly healed.

23.Name: Pathfinder's Guidance
23.Description:
Elheryn, the Pathfinder, guides you through the dungeon.

By defeating all highlighted enemies you will reach the required Kill Score and be led to the boss.

BONUS
While in combat with enemies marked with Pathfinder's Guidance, you gain Haste.
Contender: +20% Haste
Adept: +15% Haste
Champion: +10% Haste
Paragon: +5% Haste

24.Name: Anomalous Orbs
24.Description:
Three Anomalous Orbs spawn near enemies periodically. The orbs are targetable and can be damaged.

Once spawned, the orbs cast Detonate, an interruptable cast that deals heavy damage to all players if left unchecked. The Anomalous Orbs are susceptible to all forms of Crowd Control, which will also interrupt the cast of Detonate.

Anomalous Orbs take 400% increased damage while not actively casting Detonate.

BONUS
Each Anomalous Orb players destroy grants +480 Gem Power to the corresponding color of the Orb that was destroyed for 45 seconds.

25.Name: Storm Shield
25.Description:
Periodically, players will charge up with red lightning for 8 seconds, after which a massive bolt strikes all players, dealing lethal damage.

For the 8 seconds that players are charged up, players are granted Storm Shield, reducing all damage taken by 50%. In addition, damage is split among other players near you.

BONUS
Players who survive the massive bolt are granted Storm's Fury for 20 seconds, granting +20% critical strike chance.

27.Name: Truesight
27.Description:
Every 30% of Kill Score, an enemy will drop a Truesight Orb. Collecting a Truesight Orb will grant Truesight, revealing the next enemy marked by the Heskyr. This enemy will deal pulsating damage until killed.

BONUS
When a Heskyr-marked enemy is killed, all heroes gain Might of the Heskyr, increasing their damage dealt and healing done by 20%.

OddComp.Objective: Complete dungeons as any Odd Comp team composition

HolyTrinityNerf.Note: Group-comp balancing modifier (always on). Level0-4 = role COUNT: EnemyHealthModifier by #Tanks, PlayerDamageModifier / PlayerHealingTakenModifier by #Healers, EnemyPrimaryStatModifier by #Dps. No<Role>Bonus = special bonuses granted when that role is absent (some interpolate by dungeon difficulty between MinDungeonDifficulty and MaxDungeonDifficulty).
